name: Dashboard

values.name: init
values.comment: a Task that will give you the initial dashboard model.

values.name: update
values.type: Config { toMsg : Msg -> msg } -> List (Widget data msg) -> Msg -> Model -> ( Model, Cmd Msg, Maybe (List ( String, { x : Int, y : Int, height : Int, width : Int } )) )

values.name: view
values.type: Config { toMsg : Msg -> msg } -> Model -> List (Widget data msg) -> data -> Html msg

values.name: widget
values.comment:
Creates a widget.
the `id` must be unique. `frame` in the size of the widget in grid dimensions.
`toContent` is a function that produces the widget's content. It is passed
the actual size of the widget so you can adjust the content.
values.type: String -> Frame -> (data -> Size -> Html msg) -> Widget data msg
